title: Congestion-aware service staffing
prompt: A clinic schedules integer staffing levels by hour before walk-in arrivals occur. Waiting costs and labor costs enter the objective, while service rates are fixed parameters. Explain the staffing-versus-delay trade-off without treating realized queues or clinician speed as controllable.

model_specification.mathematical_objective: minimize expected waiting cost plus labor cost
model_specification.mechanism: Staffing changes service capacity, which interacts with stochastic arrivals to produce congestion.
